message:
ci: add ACFS notification workflow for installer changes

Add GitHub Actions workflow to notify ACFS (Agentic Coding Flywheel
Setup) when install.sh changes, enabling automatic checksum updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,103 +1,99 @@
-# ACFS Installer Change Notification Workflow
-# Generated by ACFS audit on 2026-01-26
-# Tool: ms (meta_skill)
-name: Notify ACFS of Installer Changes
+# installer-notify.yml
+# Copy this to .github/workflows/ in your project
+# Notifies ACFS when install.sh changes
+#
+# Setup:
+# 1. Create a GitHub PAT with `repo` scope
+# 2. Add it as ACFS_DISPATCH_TOKEN secret in your repo
+# 3. Copy this file to .github/workflows/
+
+name: Notify ACFS of Installer Change
 
 on:
   push:
     branches: [main, master]
     paths:
+      - 'install.sh'
+      - 'scripts/install.sh'
+      - '**/install.sh'
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main, master]
+    paths:
+      - 'install.sh'
       - 'scripts/install.sh'
-  workflow_dispatch:
-    inputs:
-      dry_run:
-        description: 'Test without sending notification'
-        required: false
-        default: 'false'
-        type: boolean
-      force:
-        description: 'Force notification even if checksum unchanged'
-        required: false
-        default: 'false'
-        type: boolean
+      - '**/install.sh'
 
-env:
-  TOOL_NAME: 'ms'
-  INSTALLER_PATH: 'scripts/install.sh'
-  ACFS_REPO: 'Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup'
+concurrency:
+  group: installer-notify-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
 
 jobs:
-  compute-and-notify:
+  notify-acfs:
+    # Only notify on push to main, not PRs
+    if: github.event_name == 'push'
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    permissions:
-      contents: read
-
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
-          fetch-depth: 2
+          fetch-depth: 1
 
-      - name: Compute SHA256
+      - name: Compute installer SHA256
         id: checksum
         run: |
-          SHA256=$(sha256sum "${{ env.INSTALLER_PATH }}" | cut -d' ' -f1)
-          echo "sha256=$SHA256" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-          echo "Computed SHA256: $SHA256"
-
-      - name: Get previous checksum
-        id: previous
-        run: |
-          if git show HEAD~1:"${{ env.INSTALLER_PATH }}" > /tmp/prev 2>/dev/null; then
-            PREV=$(sha256sum /tmp/prev | cut -d' ' -f1)
-            echo "prev_sha256=$PREV" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-            echo "Previous SHA256: $PREV"
+          # Find the installer file
+          if [ -f install.sh ]; then
+            INSTALLER_PATH="install.sh"
+          elif [ -f scripts/install.sh ]; then
+            INSTALLER_PATH="scripts/install.sh"
           else
-            echo "prev_sha256=none" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-            echo "No previous version found"
+            echo "No installer found"
+            exit 1
           fi
 
-      - name: Compare checksums
-        id: compare
-        run: |
-          if [[ "${{ steps.checksum.outputs.sha256 }}" != "${{ steps.previous.outputs.prev_sha256 }}" ]]; then
-            echo "changed=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-          else
-            echo "changed=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-          fi
-
-      - name: Notify ACFS (dry run)
-        if: |
-          (steps.compare.outputs.changed == 'true' || github.event.inputs.force == 'true') &&
-          github.event.inputs.dry_run == 'true'
-        run: |
-          echo "::notice::DRY RUN - Would send notification to ACFS"
-          echo "Tool: ${{ env.TOOL_NAME }}"
-          echo "SHA256: ${{ steps.checksum.outputs.sha256 }}"
+          SHA256=$(sha256sum "$INSTALLER_PATH" | cut -d' ' -f1)
+          echo "sha256=$SHA256" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "Computed SHA256: $SHA256"
 
       - name: Notify ACFS
-        if: |
-          (steps.compare.outputs.changed == 'true' || github.event.inputs.force == 'true') &&
-          github.event.inputs.dry_run != 'true'
         uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
         with:
-          token: ${{ secrets.ACFS_NOTIFY_TOKEN }}
-          repository: ${{ env.ACFS_REPO }}
+          token: ${{ secrets.ACFS_DISPATCH_TOKEN }}
+          repository: Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
           event-type: installer-updated
           client-payload: |
             {
-              "tool": "${{ env.TOOL_NAME }}",
-              "new_sha256": "${{ steps.checksum.outputs.sha256 }}",
-              "old_sha256": "${{ steps.previous.outputs.prev_sha256 }}",
+              "tool": "${{ github.event.repository.name }}",
               "repo": "${{ github.repository }}",
-              "commit": "${{ github.sha }}"
+              "commit": "${{ github.sha }}",
+              "new_sha256": "${{ steps.checksum.outputs.sha256 }}",
+              "ref": "${{ github.ref }}",
+              "actor": "${{ github.actor }}"
             }
 
-      - name: Summary
-        if: always()
+      - name: Log notification
+        run: |
+          echo "::notice::Notified ACFS about installer change"
+          echo "Repository: ${{ github.repository }}"
+          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
+          echo "SHA256: ${{ steps.checksum.outputs.sha256 }}"
+
+  # Validate installer syntax on PRs
+  validate-installer:
+    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install shellcheck
+        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y shellcheck
+
+      - name: Shellcheck installer
         run: |
-          echo "## ACFS Notification Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| Field | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "|-------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| Tool | ${{ env.TOOL_NAME }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| SHA256 | \`${{ steps.checksum.outputs.sha256 }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| Changed | ${{ steps.compare.outputs.changed }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          EXIT_CODE=0
+          for script in install.sh scripts/install.sh; do
+            if [ -f "$script" ]; then
+              echo "Checking $script..."
+              shellcheck "$script" || EXIT_CODE=1
+            fi
+          done
+          exit $EXIT_CODE
